style.html: synchronously by the inline script below for * widget-hosting routes (/, /buy, /sell and their sub-paths), so the * lock is in place from the VERY FIRST paint — before React even * starts loading. Without this, the hardcoded landing skeleton * (>800px) plus the ExchangeSeoHero (min-h-820px) push the body * taller than typical viewport heights, and the browser paints a * native scrollbar on the right edge before any JS can react. * * React removes this class once the widget finishes its reveal * (see FiatFirstLoadSessionV2Widget.tsx — useLayoutEffect keyed off * entryKey + MIN_INITIAL_SKELETON_MS timer). * * !important guards against the base `html, body { overflow-x: hidden }` * rule in index.css from winning on longhand specificity. */ html.swaps-widget-skeleton-lock, html.swaps-widget-skeleton-lock body { overflow: hidden !important; }

article.h1: Buy, Sell & Swap Crypto at the Best Rate
article.p: Buy crypto, sell crypto, or swap tokens at the best guaranteed rate. Compare providers instantly with 34+ payment methods. Non-custodial — crypto goes directly to your wallet.

ol.li: Choose your crypto and payment method

ul.li: Bitcoin (BTC) — Digital gold. The currency the internet chose.
Ethereum (ETH) — The world computer. Build anything, own everything.
Solana (SOL) — Speed meets scale. Crypto at the speed of light.
XRP — Move money anywhere. In seconds, not days.
Tether (USDT) — The most traded stablecoin. Liquidity everywhere.
USDC — Digital dollars you can trust. Backed 1:1, always.
BNB — Power a blockchain used by millions.
Cardano (ADA) — Built on science. Designed to last.

article.p: Plus 45+ more tokens. View all cryptocurrencies.
And 25+ more methods. View all payment methods.
Global coverage with local payment methods. Buy and sell crypto from anywhere.
